title: Penny Stock Lucid (LCID) Receives $1B Boost from Saudi Arabia's PIF
text: Lucid received $1.03 billion investment from Saudi Arabia's PIF through share purchases at $2.59 per share in October 2024. The investment supported stock price amid market pressures. PIF purchased approximately 396 million LCID shares demonstrating continued commitment. The investment extended company liquidity runway and signaled confidence in long-term business plan.
